# BuffChangeKind enumeration

How a buff's state changed, as reported by [`BuffChanged`](./CombatEvent.BuffChanged.md).

```csharp
public enum BuffChangeKind
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Applied | `0` | Buff was freshly applied to the target. |
| Refreshed | `1` | An already-active buff had its duration or stacks refreshed. |
| Removed | `2` | Buff was removed from the target. |
